displayName.heading: Display name
displayName.description: The name shown on your account and in the profile menu.
displayName.label: Display name

updates.heading: Updates
updates.disabled: Update checking is disabled on this server.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the vaultctl interface.
language.label: Interface language

sessions.activeDescription: Devices currently signed in. Revoking a device ends its access immediately.
sessions.signOutOthers: Sign out of all other devices
sessions.pastDescription: Older sessions that have not been active recently. Revoke any you do not recognize.
sessions.revokeCurrentConfirm: Revoking this device will log you out here. Continue?

backup.title: Backup & Sync
backup.description: Schedule automatic, encrypted backups of your vaults to a destination of your choice. Backups carry only ciphertext - they are useless without your master password - and run on the server even when this app is closed.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete destination
deleteConfirm.message: Delete the backup destination "{{label}}"? Stored backups at this destination are not removed, but no further backups will run here.

backup.localWarning: A local copy lives on the server's disk. A disk failure loses it - pair it with an off-box destination for real durability.
backup.connectIntro: You'll be sent to {{provider}} to authorize access to an app-private folder. After connecting, set the schedule here.
backup.label: Label
backup.localStored: Stored in the server's configured backup directory. A disk failure loses it - pair it with an off-box destination for durability.

biometric.signInAgain: Sign in again before enabling Touch ID
biometric.title: Unlock with Touch ID
biometric.descriptionEnrolled: Used for unlock and identity confirmation on this device.
biometric.descriptionUnsupported: This browser can't unlock with biometrics: its authenticator doesn't support the secure key (PRF) vaultctl needs. Unlock with your master password instead, or try a desktop browser.
biometric.descriptionAvailable: Skip the master password on this device after one verification.

recoveryKit.signOutAndBack: Please sign out and back in, then regenerate your recovery kit
recoveryKit.title: Recovery Kit
recoveryKit.description: A spare key that resets your master password if you forget it. Regenerating invalidates the old one immediately.
recoveryKit.saveNote: Save this recovery key somewhere safe and private. It will not be shown again, and it replaces any earlier kit.
recoveryKit.lostWarning: If you lose this key <1>and</1> forget your master password, your vault is lost for good - zero-knowledge means no one can recover it.

about.subtitle: All cryptography runs in your browser. The server only ever stores encrypted data.
about.buildValue: Single Go binary with embedded web UI

update.title: Software updates
update.disabled: Update checking is disabled on this server.
update.available: v{{version}} is available{{severity}} - you're on v{{current}}.
update.notifyHint: The self-hosted server is updated by your administrator; vaultctl shows a banner with the release notes when a new version is published.
